tagged_types.name: TSourceMgr
tagged_types.code: type TSourceMgr is tagged limited private;

subprograms.name: Open
subprograms.code: procedure Open (Object : in out TSourceMgr; Name : TText)

subprograms.name: Read
subprograms.code: procedure Read (Object : in out TSourceMgr; Ch1, Ch2 : out Character)

subprograms.name: Status
subprograms.code: procedure Status (Object : TSourceMgr; Name : out TText; Ligne : out Natural)
